frequently_asked_questions.question: How can I apply for admission to KSSEM?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Admissions are based on Karnataka CET for undergraduate programs and GATE/PGCET for postgraduate programs. Applications are open from March to June. Visit our admissions office in the Administrative Block or check our website for detailed information.

frequently_asked_questions.question: What are the library timings?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: The KSSEM Central Library is open from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM on all working days. It's located in Block F, Ground Floor. The library has a capacity of 200 students and offers digital resources, research databases, and study spaces.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Where is the cafeteria and what are the meal timings?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: The cafeteria is located in Block G, Ground Floor. It serves breakfast (7:00-10:00 AM), lunch (12:00-2:00 PM), and dinner (6:00-8:00 PM). We offer both vegetarian and non-vegetarian options, including South Indian, North Indian, and Chinese cuisines.

frequently_asked_questions.question: What are the placement statistics for KSSEM?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: KSSEM has achieved 85% placement rate in 2023. Top recruiters include TCS, Infosys, Wipro, Accenture, and L&T. The highest package offered was 12 LPA, with an average package of 4.5 LPA. Visit the Placement Cell in Admin-101 for more details.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Does KSSEM provide hostel facilities?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Yes, KSSEM provides separate hostel facilities for boys and girls. Boys' hostel accommodates 300 students and girls' hostel accommodates 200 students. Facilities include Wi-Fi, mess, recreation room, and 24/7 security. Contact the hostel warden for admission details.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Where are the computer labs located?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Computer labs are primarily in Block A (CSE Department). Main labs include Programming Lab (A-201), Data Structures Lab (A-202), DBMS Lab (A-301), Networks Lab (A-302), and AI/ML Lab (A-401). All labs have the latest software and high-speed internet.

frequently_asked_questions.question: What is the fee structure for different courses?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: B.Tech fee is ₹1,20,000 per year. M.Tech fee is ₹80,000 per year. MBA fee is ₹1,50,000 per year. Additional charges include library fee (₹2,000), lab fee (₹5,000), and development fee (₹3,000). Scholarships are available for merit and need-based students.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Are medical facilities available on campus?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Yes, KSSEM has a medical center in Block J, Ground Floor. It operates from 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM with qualified medical staff. First aid, basic treatments, and health checkups are available. For emergencies, we have tie-ups with nearby hospitals.

frequently_asked_questions.question: What research opportunities are available?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: KSSEM has a dedicated Research Center in Block R. We offer research opportunities in AI/ML, IoT, Renewable Energy, and Environmental Engineering. Students can participate in funded projects, publish papers, and attend conferences. Contact Dr. Mohan Krishna, Research Head.

frequently_asked_questions.question: What sports facilities are available?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: KSSEM has a well-equipped gymnasium in Block I (6:00 AM - 9:00 PM), outdoor basketball and volleyball courts, cricket ground, and indoor games facility. We also have a swimming pool and conduct regular sports tournaments and competitions.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Does KSSEM provide transportation?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Yes, KSSEM operates bus services from major areas in Bangalore including Electronic City, Koramangala, Jayanagar, and Marathahalli. Bus timings are 7:30 AM (pickup) and 5:30 PM (drop). Contact the transport office for route details and passes.

frequently_asked_questions.question: Is Wi-Fi available on campus?
frequently_asked_questions.answer: Yes, high-speed Wi-Fi is available throughout the campus including all blocks, library, cafeteria, and hostels. Students get individual login credentials with daily data limits. The network name is 'KSSEM_Student' for academic use.

quick_answers.principal: Dr. Srinivasa Rao is the Principal of KSSEM
quick_answers.location: KSSEM is located in Bangalore, Karnataka, India
quick_answers.total_faculty: We have 63 faculty members across all departments
quick_answers.accreditation: KSSEM is NAAC accredited with 'A' grade
quick_answers.university: We are affiliated to Visvesvaraya Technological University (VTU)
